system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Arm Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

You touch a little known meridian along the back causing the person to succumb to uncontrollable rage. Make an Arm Strike roll against Parry. On a Success the target is briefly overcome with a raging madness and anger that confuses his sense of friend and foe. The target gains a +1d10 to all Damage rolls, but must Attack the nearest ally (and if that is not possible, nearest enemy). This lasts two rounds. On a Total Success the effect lasts one extra round per Rank of Dianxue. Cathartic: When used Cathartically this lasts ten minutes per Rank of Qi (on a Total Success it lasts an additional ten minutes per Rank of Dianxue).
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: Raging confusion for 2 rounds: +1d10 Damage, must attack nearest ally if possible
system.totalSuccessTargetEffects: Raging confusion lasts 2 rounds plus 1 round per Rank of Dianxue
system.catharticTargetEffects: Raging confusion lasts 10 minutes per Rank of Qi
system.catharticTotalSuccessTargetEffects: Raging confusion lasts 10 minutes per Rank of Qi plus 10 minutes per Rank of Dianxue
system.catharticEffect: When used Cathartically this lasts ten minutes per Rank of Qi (on a Total Success it lasts an additional ten minutes per Rank of Dianxue).
